title: Vignea vulpinoidea
taxonomy: Vignea vulpinoidea is commonly known as the wolfberry or goji berry. The classification of Vignea vulpinoidea is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Lamiales, family Adoxaceae. Within the Adoxaceae family, it is part of the genus Vitis and is considered a type of berry-producing shrub. It is often referred to as a type of fruit-bearing plant native to Asia. This plant is also known for its medicinal properties and nutritional value.
